title: Build a line-following robot
description: Combine your servo and sensor skills to build a robot that follows a taped track using dual infrared detectors.

dialogue.text: Let's take your servo skills further. We'll build a tiny robot that follows a dark line on the floor by comparing two infrared sensors.

options.text: I'm in! What parts do I need?

dialogue.text: You'll need two infrared sensors, a pair of continuous-rotation servos, and an Arduino. Mount everything on a small chassis and make sure the sensor brackets sit just above the ground.

Wire each sensor to an analog pin, map the readings to left and right wheel speed, and add a small PID term to smooth out curves. Place the bot on a high-contrast tape line and tune until it tracks cleanly.
